Buses arrive at a specified stop at 15 minute intervals starting at 7 AM. If a passenger arrives at the stop at a random time between 7:00 and 7:30 AM, then the probability that the passenger waits less than 6 minutes is ________.

Solution

Q18 MCQ Not checked
Technical • COMPUTER SCIENCE • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

The normal distribution N(μ, σ2) with mean μ ∈ R and variance σ2 > 0 has probability distribution function:

The difference of median and mean is ________.

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)
Mean, median and mode are all same (μ) for normal distribution.
